components.notes: One container: nginx (port 80) → Next.js (:3000) + Express (:3001). Redis via Upstash. CI/CD via GitHub Actions on push to master.

shared_services.llm_gateway: BYOK — users provide own keys; server fallback via .env
shared_services.stt: Groq Whisper API — user BYOK key

redis: Upstash — set REDIS_URL in Azure Container App env vars
